ruleSets.sourceName: DoD NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Methodology

rules.title: Limit system access to authorized users, processes, and devices.
rules.assessmentObjective: Deduct when the requirement is not implemented for the assessed system boundary.

rules.title: Limit system access to authorized transactions and functions.
rules.assessmentObjective: Deduct when access enforcement is not implemented or cannot be supported with evidence.

rules.title: Use multifactor authentication for privileged and non-privileged accounts.
rules.assessmentObjective: Deduct when multifactor authentication coverage is missing or incomplete.
